reviews.review_description: Apparently there's no settings on this game. I'm 3 feet tall. I'm not it even going to try to play this game.

One of my favorite games! I can’t wait for more like these. You are completely immersed in an escape room in space and you have to find little clues along the way. The only thing I wanted was MORE! Will be keeping an eye out for more like these!

developer_response.body: Love your review, the good news is, you don't have to wait longer. The sequel "AVO: Echoes of the void" will be live on March 26 :) If you didn't do already, please join our discord (check avovr .com ) to get there/ And we'll see you there!

reviews.review_description:
This was looking to be a great game ... BUT with its rubbish control system it fails greatly ... No free movement, free turning, crouch, its lazy tutorial, keeps this otherwise great puzzle game off my wishlist 
Link to my Review 
  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oEwc5bz_6iQ

Depending on your ability on escape rooms, this one can be fairly quick or you might find yourself staring at the same puzzle for hours on end. Sometimes when you realize what you were missing the whole time, you just want to smack your head. If you are up for a bit of a challenge, then avoid any possible spoilers at all costs, cause nothing changes between playthroughs. Meaning once you found the solution, you can try and speed run it next time blindfolded. There are some variations between each of the puzzles, so it's not like you solve one and you solve them all. But, some parts just remind me of an Easter egg hunt. 

From having played test versions and the current live version, they have been pretty receptive to feedback. However, there are still some things that could be improved and hopefully will be in future updates. Currently there are no settings for playing seated/standing. So, some puzzles might be hard to work on if you are seated. The main grab function is on the right hand only and you have no pockets. So, grabbing multiple objects can be a challenge as some reset back to their original spot if left alone too long. You can only teleport to specific spots and snap rotate. Sometimes when teleporting between spots, you are recentered and have to physically move to get in reach of the puzzle. The way items snap to the hand can be a little finicky at times. Make sure if you are going to take a break, you do it after you hear/see the announcement that a checkpoint has been saved, as some steps in between will be reset to the previous checkpoint. 

This is a fun one to drop friends into as there is no immediate “danger”, nothing to scare them, just simple escape room puzzle solving and the controls are easy enough for anyone to pick up. If they are stubborn and don’t want hints, they might have to come back for a future play session.

I love escape room games and this one lives up to it. There are minor kinks with grabbing items but eventually you can get it. I do wish you could walk freely instead of teleport. I would consider it on the harder side but not so difficult that you couldn't complete it in 1 sitting. Looking forward to the next chapter.

"AVO Escape Space"
Review by ArnookieVR, 

I recently had the chance to play AVO Escape Space, a virtual reality escape room game that takes place in outer space. 
AVO Escape space is designed in collaboration with real-life escape-the-room games and is created by the studio "Game Cooks". 
You play as PatientZ, the last surviving passenger aboard the spaceship, and you must solve intricate and mind-bending puzzles to escape the vessel and secure your freedom. The game is described as “dystopian” and may take more than four hours+ to complete.

The game’s story is set in a dystopian future where you are the only survivor of a spaceship that has been hit by a meteor storm. You play as PatientZ, who must solve puzzles to escape the doomed vessel. The game’s puzzles are designed to be challenging and require you to think outside the box. You will need to use your wits and problem-solving skills to progress through the game.

The game’s graphics are stunning, and the VR experience is immersive. The game’s sound effects and music add to the overall atmosphere of the game. The game is set to release on October 17th, 2023 on the Meta Quest platform via App Lab and will be available to purchase by the time this review is posted!

If you’re a fan of escape room games and enjoy solving puzzles, this game might be worth checking out. With its immersive graphics, challenging puzzles, and engaging storyline, AVO Escape Space is sure to provide hours of entertainment.

My only gripe is with the teleportation movement I hope the developer adds free range movement in the future. Adding this feature would make the game fully playable whilst seated. 

You really feel a sense of achievement when you finish the game In a way that's hard to explain.

I hope you find this review Useful. ☺️
If you did consider joining my Facebook group just replace the words dot with a full stop!
wwwDotfacebookDotcom/groups/QuestCentral/?ref=share_group_link

reviews.review_title: A must have for escape room fans
reviews.review_description:
The game is amazing. 

Escape Room in its best form. 
Great graphics, audio. The puzzles require logical thinking, everything planned down to the smallest detail.

This game will put your mind to the test

I wholeheartedly recommend it

ProjektVR

This game impressed me with a nice atmospheric sci-fi setting and puzzles that were unexpectedly more difficult than they seemed at first glance, but still quite solvable in my opinion.
The hints were just right, not too easy, but with a bit of patience they put me on the right track.
On the other hand, I only noticed one minor problem with the positioning of my hands. They felt slightly unnatural when I held objects, especially when I tried to rotate those objects.
Also, I would have preferred to teleport with the left joystick, i.e. having all movement controls on the same stick.
All in all, this game surprised me in a very positive way and I'm already looking forward to the next chapter.

PS: I would have given 5 stars if the controls felt slightly better or if there were configurable gameplay settings.

I have had the pleasure of testing this game and I cannot wait for more content.  Some of the gestures in having to grasp or rotate objects can be finicky, but the principles and challenges of the game are unique in comparison to other solve-it puzzlers and escape-rooms I have experienced.  The quality of the graphics is also a big plus for me.  I was able to play the game fully seated with having to stand only 2 or 3 times when I needed to reach for an object.  Nothing I experienced deterred me from wanting to come back and finish this game.


I do wish we had free range motion instead of teleporting, but the teleporting was an aid because it restricted you to the important parts of the room.  Essentially, the teleport landing spots kept you focused and moving forward.  I don't want to spoil too much, but the clues around the room were challenging in themselves... so I felt engaged every step of the way.  I cannot wait for the next chapter.  Even just learning how to travel between the rooms was such an exhilarating find.  I've never seen another escape-room game do that.  Being vague so I avoid spoilers.

I loved this game and want more! The puzzles are challenging and a couple had me stumped but if you keep at it you’ll figure them out. This is the first part of a series. Not sure how many chapters there will be but in less than a year we should be able to play the next installment and i’ll be ready and waiting for it! If you like puzzle games you need to buy this as it’s not too expensive and what they did with such a small team is amazing and deserves support!

Really active on discord too so I recommend joining and giving feedback if you have some.

I had a blast playing this VR game! It was challenging, immersive, and thrilling. The graphics were sharp, the puzzles were clever, and the story was captivating. I felt like I was really in a spaceship, trying to escape from a deadly situation. The game kept me on the edge of my seat, as I had to use my wits and skills to solve the mysteries and avoid the dangers. The game was not too easy or too hard, but just the right level of difficulty.

An absolute hidden gem, that should get a lot more attention, if you like VR Puzzlers and VR Escape Room Simulators, then you cannot go wrong with this intelligent and expertly crafted game.
Given the premise of escaping an abandoned and doomed vessel in space, the puzzles you need to solve to achieve your goal are both challenging and cunningly interwoven, a truly top-notch game from a small team with a great future... Super head-scratching fun.

If you enjoy escape rooms or puzzles, this one is a MUST HAVE, especially for the price! The puzzles are creatively challenging, but not completely impossible. The game is pretty immersive even with restricted location teleporting, which I enjoy. I also really like that a pop up happens when it saves your progress so you know where you will have to start again if you quit. 

The game is short but I'm looking forward to the release of more content. Also, when you finish it, check the credits for my name! 😁

Absolutely superb game! 

The puzzles are spot on! Really well thought out…

Beautiful visuals and a must have for all puzzler fans! At at such a cheap price this game is a steal…

Fist batch of rooms were really fun to play through, and Game Cooks are working on new rooms! So I’d grab this game now while it’s at a bargain price. 

You won’t be disappointed it’s absolutely amazing.
The puzzles are very challenging! And the graphics are amazing!

This game got me hooked till the end! 💥
You can't just leave your device and say I'll continue later on, trust me it's not that simple!
Every time you solve a puzzle it is linked into another one and so on till you reach the end!
The puzzles are brilliantly crafted, they require ingenuity and Superior attention to details in order to know what to use and where!
Can't wait for the next chapter... 🤩

reviews.review_title: Good start to the escape room series!
reviews.review_description: A tough little escape room that will have you scratching your head at points.  A lot of potential for the next chapter! Really enjoyed this.

reviews.review_title: one of the best escape rooms
reviews.review_description:
lets me start by saying the introduction gives a very cool vibe to the game !!
the puzzles are amazing , fun to play , and easy to interact with .
the graphics  are very smooth and one of the best I have seen in an escape room .
its a must have game for all the gamers out there .
and I hope u enjoy  the game like I have !!

I really love this one. it's very intuitive to find your next steps. Puzzles are really well made and very challenging. Solving them feel incredibly rewarding. It's mentally stimulating. 
The graphics look pretty descent, and the overall mood is spot on.
